title: part field of unsigned bigint type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t ( id BIGINT UNSIGNED, k INT, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL ) PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS(id) ( PARTITION part1 VALUES LESS THAN(10) );
ALTER TABLE t ADD PARTITION (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN(18446744073709551615));
INSERT INTO t (id, k, name) VALUES (5, 1, 'Alice');
INSERT INTO t (id, k, name) VALUES (18446744073709551615, 2, 'Bob');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE id IS NULL OR k > 1;
key_bug_features: Partitioning with unsigned bigint exceeding LLONG_MAX
